questions.context_sentence: Do you know any more 'crazy' things that adults say to children?
questions.hint: cr- (哭) + a + zy (自)：哭得像个疯子一样，真的很crazy。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Read the webchats.
questions.hint: web (网) + chat (聊天)：在网上聊天就是webchat。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Well, we watched a lot of TV and our eyes are still normal, haha!
questions.hint: nor (没有) + mal (坏)：没有变坏，说明是正常的normal。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Well, we watched a lot of TV and our eyes are still ____, haha!

questions.context_sentence: But he had another favourite too.
questions.hint: fav- (喜欢) + our (我们的) + ite：我们最喜欢的favourite。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I always liked doing dangerous things.
questions.hint: danger (危险) + ous (形容词后缀)：充满危险的，即dangerous。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I didn't understand the joke for years!
questions.hint: under (在下面) + stand (站)：站在真理下面，你就理解understand了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I didn't ____ the joke for years!

questions.context_sentence: If I was angry or upset, I always made a face.
questions.hint: up (向上) + set (放置)：把心情向上翻了个个，肯定很不舒服upset。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: your face will stay like that forever!
questions.hint: for (为了) + ever (曾经)：为了曾经的承诺，直到永远forever。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Use the first conditional to talk about possible events.
questions.hint: condition (条件) + al (形容词后缀)：有条件的conditional。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Use the first ____ to talk about possible events.

questions.context_sentence: As soon as I get my exam results, I'll phone you.
questions.hint: re (再次) + sults (跳)：跳出来的东西就是结果results。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: When I see Martin, I'll give him your message.
questions.hint: mes- (麦斯) + sage (贤人)：贤人传达的信息message。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: He's got a big business meeting he has to attend.
questions.hint: at (在) + tend (照料)：在场照料，即参加attend。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He's got a big business meeting he has to ____.

questions.context_sentence: He's got a big business meeting.
questions.hint: busy (忙碌) + ness (名词后缀)：忙碌的事情就是生意business。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: He's got a big business meeting.
questions.hint: meet (遇见) + ing：大家遇见在一起就是开会meeting。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Something important?
questions.hint: im (进入) + port (港口) + ant：进入港口的东西都很重要important。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Dad, say that again. What? The hospital?
questions.hint: host (主人) + pital (别跑)：主人病了，快跑向医院hospital。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: PHRASES FOR FLUENCY
questions.hint: flu (流) + ency (名词后缀)：像水流一样，就是流利fluency。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Find the expressions 1-6 in the story.
questions.hint: ex (出) + press (压) + ion：压出来的东西就是表达expression。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Match them to the definitions a-f.
questions.hint: de (下) + finit (界限) + ion：划下界限，就是定义definition。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's a surprise!
questions.hint: sur (在上面) + prise (抓)：突然被从上面抓住，感到很惊喜surprise。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Do you do a lot of exercise?
questions.hint: ex (出) + er (耳) + cise (切)：出了一身汗，切开耳朵去锻炼exercise。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Do you do a lot of ____?

questions.context_sentence: Who does the cleaning in your house?
questions.hint: clean (干净) + ing：把东西变干净的过程就是清洁cleaning。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: FUNCTIONS: Sympathising
questions.hint: sym (共同) + path (情感) + ise (动词后缀)：产生共同的情感，就是同情sympathise。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: That's a shame.
questions.hint: sh (谁) + ame (爱我)：没人爱我，真是一种遗憾shame。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: n. 看电视过久导致的视力疲劳
questions.context_sentence: If you watch TV all the time, you'll get square eyes.
questions.hint: square (正方形) + eyes (眼睛)：看电视看成方眼睛。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 看电视过久导致的视力疲劳

questions.context_sentence: If you eat all your carrots, you'll see in the dark!
questions.hint: see (看) + dark (黑暗)：在黑暗中看。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: As soon as I think of other examples, I'll tell you.
questions.hint: soon (快)：很快地就...
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: ____ I think of other examples, I'll tell you.

questions.context_sentence: he shouts at me all the time.
questions.hint: shout (喊) + at (指向)：对着某人喊。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: he shouts at me all the time.
questions.hint: all (所有) + time (时间)：所有的时间里都在发生。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Poor you.
questions.hint: poor (贫穷/可怜) + you (你)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I can't wait!
questions.hint: can't (不能) + wait (等待)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Wait and see.
questions.hint: wait (等) + see (看)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's all ups and downs.
questions.hint: up (上) + down (下)：有上有下，就是起伏。
questions.title: Vocab Master
